content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sereja and Brackets". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/380/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The next line contains a string of n characters, each of which is either an opening bracket '(' or a closing bracket ')'.
content.outputFormat: The number of operations required to balance the brackets.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
s = input()
open_count = s.count('(')
close_count = s.count(')')
print(abs(open_count - close_count))
